snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official Countdown Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

The International Competition is ramping up with MSI 2026 in Daejeon, South Korea, at the Daejeon Convention Center.  The Play-In Stage features a 4-team, double-elimination bracket, which qualifies one team into the Bracket Stage— where they will compete against seven other teams. 

To learn more about the MSI format, check out https://riot.com/4o3QR9r

Play-Ins: June 28 - July 1
Bracket Stage: July 3-6 & 8-12
Upper Final: July 9

snippet.title: 『劇場版 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝』予告｜2026年12月11日（金）公開
snippet.description:
水上都市に隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！
『劇場版 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝』2026/12/11(金) 公開決定✨

シリーズ初となる劇場版は、原作者・日向夏による完全新作ストーリー！

【ストーリー】
帝から壬氏にとある命が下された。
それは、5 年前に後宮で命を落とした妃の“故郷へ帰りたい”という最期の願いを叶えること。
遺体の謎を解き明かすため、猫猫は壬氏に連れられ、南の地へと旅に出る。
辿り着いたのは、活気あふれる水上都市。
そこに隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！！

snippet.title: The Hardest Challenge In Kingdom Come Deliverance 2.
snippet.description:
Kingdom Come: Deliverance II is a 2025 action role-playing game developed by Warhorse Studios and I absolutely love it! THIS VIDEO IS LOVINGLY SUPPORTED BY OUR FRIENDS AT HOLY PLEASE SHOW THEM SOME LOVE AND TRY THEIR TEA! Link: http://uk.holy.com/brit,
Code BRIT for 10% off,
Code BRIT5 for £5 off of your first order (min. spend £14.99)


When the game released we of course did a video on how to perfectly balance the game and break it with overpowered potion crafting and alchemy henry sending all of his enemies to sleep with tummy bugs. Oh and of course how to win every game of dice and print infinite money! Now the game has been out for over a year and with that we have seen some new dlcs and updates to balance and improve the game. Part of these updates include the hardcore henry experience or hardcore mode. This adds 10 negative perks that make the game much more challenging in all aspects. However I have gone even further and added some additional extreme hardcore mods ontop of these to make it the hardest challenge in kingdom come deliverance 2. 

So Can I the spiffing brit beat this wonderful rpg. Or will my attempts to create a challenge lead me on a path of absolute nightmares!

snippet.title: HOUSE OF THE DRAGON Season 3 Episode 3 Official Trailer (2026)
snippet.description:
Check out the new trailer for House of the Dragon! Streaming on HBO Max now.

The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.

© Home Box Office (HBO)

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Ride (Sub. Español + Lyrics)

"Ride" de Twenty One Pilots es un viaje introspectivo oculto tras un ritmo alegre. La canción explora la lucha contra la ansiedad y el exceso de pensamiento (overthinking), planteando el dilema existencial de que morir por alguien es fácil, pero el verdadero reto es tener el valor de vivir por ellos. Es una invitación a tomarse el tiempo necesario para procesar el caos de la vida mientras disfrutamos del trayecto. ✨

snippet.title: CSM - INVITE ONLY [FREESTYLE]
snippet.description:
Rising star CSM steps up for an emotionally charged installment of "Invite Only" series.

CSM brings a powerful and vulnerable performance that addresses the heavy realities of mental health, trauma, and grief. 

This performance stands as a brilliant reminder of the healing power of music. It's a raw, compelling piece that needs to be heard.

Stream CSM’s latest music on all major platforms. If you've been affected by any of the themes in this video, please reach out to local mental health services or charities.

Well here’s my final serenade
Here’s a gun and here’s a blade
Here’s a picture that I saved
For too long
 
Here’s my credit card and keys
And the reason I won’t find peace
Here’s a song I should not complete
For too long
 
Here’s my pride and here’s my shame
Here’s a trophy that bears my name
Here’s all the mistakes I made
For too long
 
Here’s the answers I never gave
Here’s the calls I shoulda made
Here’s a substance that I crave
All along

Here’s my lonely serenade
Here’s a gun and here’s a blade
Here’s a picture that I saved
Before you were gone
 
Can you hold all my secrets
Can we swear that we can forget
I had lies like you wouldn’t believe
Brought to my knees
